Species of beetle

***Blabia bicolor*** is a species of [beetle](/wiki/Beetle "Beetle") in the family [Cerambycidae](/wiki/Cerambycidae "Cerambycidae"). It was described by Martins and Galileo in 2005. It is known from [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia "Colombia").[[1]](#cite_note-1)
